info.name: TicketBox - Concert Admin API
info.description:
Admin endpoints for managing concerts.

Required roles (once auth is merged): ORGANIZER or ADMIN.
Currently, it uses permitAll() as a temporary Sprint 2 workaround.

exec: console.log("Saved concertId to collection variable: " + jsonData.data.id);

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Anh Trai Say Hi Live Concert 2026",
    "description": "The biggest music concert in Vietnam featuring top artists.",
    "venueName": "Quan Khu 7 Stadium",
    "venueAddress": "202 Hoang Van Thu, Phu Nhuan, Ho Chi Minh City",
    "eventDate": "2026-09-15T19:00:00Z",
    "doorsOpenAt": "2026-09-15T17:00:00Z",
    "seatMapSvg": "<svg viewBox=\"0 0 100 100\"><rect x=\"10\" y=\"10\" width=\"80\" height=\"80\" fill=\"#ccc\"/><text x=\"50\" y=\"50\" text-anchor=\"middle\">Stage</text></svg>",
    "posterUrl": "http://localhost:8080/images/poster_sayhi.jpg",
    "createdBy": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
}

request.description: Create a new concert event in DRAFT status. The createdBy UUID matches the seeded organizer in database.
Get detail of the concert by ID.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Anh Trai Say Hi Live Concert 2026 - Updated",
    "description": "The biggest music concert in Vietnam featuring top artists (updated description).",
    "venueName": "Quan Khu 7 Stadium (Updated Venue)",
    "venueAddress": "202 Hoang Van Thu, Phu Nhuan, Ho Chi Minh City",
    "eventDate": "2026-09-15T19:30:00Z",
    "doorsOpenAt": "2026-09-15T17:30:00Z",
    "seatMapSvg": "<svg viewBox=\"0 0 100 100\"><rect x=\"10\" y=\"10\" width=\"80\" height=\"80\" fill=\"#000\"/><text x=\"50\" y=\"50\" text-anchor=\"middle\">Stage</text></svg>",
    "posterUrl": "http://localhost:8080/images/poster_sayhi_updated.jpg"
}

request.description: Update details of the concert. Note: status, createdBy, and artistBio cannot be updated here.

query.description: Filter by status (optional: DRAFT, ON_SALE, SOLD_OUT, CANCELLED, COMPLETED)

request.description: List all concerts for the admin view, supporting pagination and optional status filter.
Transition the concert status. Valid statuses: DRAFT, ON_SALE, SOLD_OUT, CANCELLED, COMPLETED.
Delete a concert. Only allowed when status is DRAFT. If there are ticket types defined, they will be deleted first (cascade delete).
